title: The Supreme Court and shadow recruitment to public employment
description: Undeniably, the Indian dream has long been tethered to public employment. For generations, government jobs have been the shared aspiration, guaranteeing recognition, dignity and fiscal stability.In a society where access to industry was constrained by colonial self-interest and entrenched caste hierarchies, the framers of the Constitution recognised the need to “make fair” the opportunity to work. This led to the incorporation of Article 16 of the Constitution, guaranteeing equality of opportuni
